content: The top running speed of a coyote is approximately 64-70 km/h (40-44 mph). However, they can sustain a speed of around 48-56 km/h (30-35 mph) for longer periods.
raw_content: The top running speed of a coyote is approximately 64-70 km/h (40-44 mph). However, they can sustain a speed of around 48-56 km/h (30-35 mph) for longer periods.
